DECLARATION OF JOHN F. VANNUCCI FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, JOSH LEWIS, ANNA KOLLER OLIVIA LEWIS (A MINOR), BY AND THROUGH HER LEGAL GUARDIAN, ANNA KOLLER LEWIS
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND AWARD FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FUN & GAMES RENTALS, STEVEN RESTIVO EVENT SERVICES, LLC, STEVE RESTIVO, THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, UNION STREET ASSOCIATION, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JOSH LEWIS SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' FIRST SETS OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, AND SERVE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, AND PLAINTIFF ANNA KOLLER LEWIS SHALL PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES AND SERVE FURTHER RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS LIKEWISE, WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, BUT ONLY AGAINST PLAINTIFFS' FORMER COUNSEL, JEANNE M. ROBERTS, ESQ., IN LIGHT OF THE DECLARATIONS OF MS. LEWIS AND HER NEW COUNSEL AND THE REPLY FILED BY DEFENDANTS. WITHIN 21 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, MS. ROBERTS SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $1,289.75 TO DEFENDANTS IN CARE OF DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL. BY 12:00 NOON ON NOVEMBER 1, 2012, DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL SHALL SERVE NOTICE OF THE ENTRY OF THIS ORDER ON MS. ROBERTS BY FAX AND REGULAR MAIL IN CARE OF THE LAW OFFICE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL, 2340 SANTA RITA ROAD, SUITE 5, PLEASANTON, CA 94566, WHICH IS THE ADDRESS STILL LISTED FOR MS. ROBERTS ON THE ONLINE RECORDS OF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA. ON ITS OWN MOTION, THE COURT ORDERS THE DOCUMENTS ATTACHED TO PLAINTIFF ANNA KOLLER LEWIS'S RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (EXHIBIT M TO THE DECLARATION OF JORDAN M. GREEN IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION) TO BE SEALED, AS THEY APPEAR TO BE PRIVATE MEDICAL RECORDS. ORDER SIGNED. JIM WEIXEL, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Anna Koller Lewis, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Olivia Lewis, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $25,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $6,250.00 payable to Law Offices of John Fitzpatrick Vannucci.
Reimbursment for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $1,490.80.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment $7,740.80.
A net balance of $ 17,259.20 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank 2220 Mountain Blvd. Oakland, CA 94611 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on January 20, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT FUN & GAMES RENTALS, STEVEN RESTIVO EVENT SERVICES, LLC, STEVE RESTIVO, THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, UNION STREET ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is GRANTED. Plaintiff Josh Lewis shall provide responses to Defendants' first sets of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and requests for production, and serve responsive documents, and Plaintiff Anna Koller Lewis shall provide further responses and serve further responsive documents likewise, within 20 days of the date of this order.

Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is granted, but only against Plaintiffs' former counsel, Jeanne M. Roberts, Esq., in light of the declarations of Ms. Lewis and her new counsel and the reply filed by Defendants. Within 21 days of the date of this order, Ms. Roberts shall pay monetary sanctions of $1,289.75 to Defendants in care of Defendants' counsel. By 12:00 noon on November 1, 2012, Defendants' counsel shall serve notice of the entry of this order on Ms. Roberts by fax and regular mail in care of the Law Office of Scott L. Woodall, 2340 Santa Rita Road, Suite 5, Pleasanton, CA 94566, which is the address still listed for Ms. Roberts on the online records of the State Bar of California.
On its own motion, the Court orders the documents attached to Plaintiff Anna Koller Lewis's responses to requests for production (Exhibit M to the Declaration of Jordan M. Green in support of the motion) to be sealed, as they appear to be private medical records. Order signed. Jim Weixel, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
